scripts.base: docker-compose stop && docker-compose up redis mongo -d
scripts.build:open: cd ./huasen-frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.rdd:open: npm run build:open && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d
scripts.build: cd ./huasen-lib && npm install && npm run build && cd ../huasen-frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.rdd: npm run build && docker-compose build --no-cache && docker-compose up -d
